auth.createUser: INSERT INTO users (name, email, password, role, is_active) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'member', TRUE) RETURNING id, email, name;
auth.getUserByEmail: SELECT id, email, password, name FROM users WHERE email = $1 LIMIT 1;
auth.getActiveSessionByRefreshToken: SELECT id, user_id FROM sessions WHERE refresh_token = $1 AND is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1;
auth.createSession: INSERT INTO sessions (user_id, ip, refresh_token, refresh_expires_at, is_active, user_agent) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, TRUE, $5) RETURNING id, refresh_token, refresh_expires_at;
auth.deactivateSessionByRefreshToken: UPDATE sessions SET is_active = FALSE, ended_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE refresh_token = $1 AND is_active = TRUE RETURNING id;
auth.insertActivityLog: INSERT INTO activity_logs (user_id, session_id, action, module, table_name, record_id, metadata, ip) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'auth', $4, $5, $6::jsonb, $7);
